description: Keyword weights for auto-scoring trending AI stories. Weights are applied when keywords appear in a story title or sum. Total weights equal 100. Higher weights indicate stronger relevance to the PerformOS audience.

scoring_rules.explanation: A story starts with a base score of 30. Keyword matches add up to 60 bonus points (capped). Sentiment adjusts by +5 (positive), 0 (neutral), or -5 (negative). Topic tags matching the user's watchlist add 5 bonus points. Final score is clamped to 1-100.
